source_filing: Microsoft Corporation Form 10-K (fiscal year ended June 30, 2025)
original_text: Microsoft Cloud revenue increased 23% to $168.9 billion.
modified_text: Microsoft's total company revenue increased 23% to $168.9 billion in fiscal year 2025.
claim: Microsoft's total revenue increased 23% to $168.9 billion in fiscal year 2025.
citation_as_written: Microsoft Corporation, Form 10-K for fiscal year ended June 30, 2025 (Management's Discussion and Analysis — fiscal year 2025 highlights).
notes: Source attributes the 23% increase to $168.9 billion specifically to the Microsoft Cloud business (a subset/line item), not the whole company. Total company revenue increased $36.6 billion or 15% per the filing. The claim generalizes a Microsoft Cloud-specific metric to total company revenue. Figures themselves are verbatim, so it is partially supported.
